notes: Iteration #68 (Campaign 2026-07-09). CROSS-SECTIONAL strategy — operates on a panel of BTC/ETH/SOL simultaneously.
Entry: when a symbol is in the lower-momentum tertile AND its close is below the volume-profile VAL, take a long mean-reversion position (fade the laggard).
Exit: vol-targeting — annualized realized vol × leverage should approximate vol_target_annualized.
Multi-symbol portfolio: per-symbol weight is 1/3 of equity at entry, gross cap 100%.
